/CAL:PARAOLE PHC/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #2 - CONVICTED PERSON CARRYING FIREARM/3000REIN/X:DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN PRC FOR 1 YEAR/X:WITHOUT TIME LOST/X:IF PAROLEEIS SUCCESSFUL IN PRC, PETITION WILL BE DISMISSED/X:IF PAROLEE IS NOT SUCCESSFUL, SENTENCE TO BE DETERMINED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SUBMIT TO DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS/X:NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/X:REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: 9 AM - 10 AM (MONDAYS TO FRIDAYS) TO TAKE  KIDS TO SCHOOL; MONDAYS, TUESDAYS, THURSDAYS AND FRIDAYS 3:15 PM - 4:15 PM TO PICK KIDS UP; WEDNESDAYS 2:15 PM - 3:15 PM TO PICK KIDS UP; FRIDAYS FROM 5 PM - 9 PM FOR AA MEETINGS//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:BALANCE OF PETITION IS DISMISSED/X:PAROLEEORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE (RAYNE VILLAREAL) UPON RELEASE VIA PHONE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT/

/CAL:DA 3056 PTR/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT/X:GRACIELA HERNANDEZ(MOM)IS  PRESENT IN COURT/PDP/WIAPTR/X:PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO ALLEGATIONS/X:DEFENSE'S ORAL REQUEST TO RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE - DENIED//X:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDSDEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:04-19-22/M31/X:PAROLE COURTREPRESENTATIVE, CHARLES BROWN, WILL MEET WITH PAROLEE TO DETERMINE IF PRCIS APPROPRIATE/X:PAROLE AGENT TO PROVIDE THE COURT AND COUNSEL MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, MENTAL HEALTH NEEDS AND PAROLE'S PLAN TO MEET THOSE NEEDS/ /CONTD: ASSESSMENT PRC; PAROLE PHC & RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/
